title: festuca ovina subsp. airoides
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. airoides, also known as sheep's fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. airoides include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Festuca ovina subsp. airoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
